name: The University of Alabama — College of Education
description: The College of Education at The University of Alabama issues microcredentials recognizing demonstrated, evidence-backed competencies in educational design, assessment, and technology integration.
_note_did: For a production deployment, issuer.id SHOULD resolve to a DID document (e.g., did:web:educatian.github.io:TeachPlay) so that assertion proofs can be verified cryptographically without contacting this server. See https://www.w3.org/TR/did-core/ and Digital Credentials Consortium guidance.
